## Testing

- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat assembleDebug`
- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat lintDebug`
- [ ] Manual UI test, if applicable

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No internet permission, analytics, ads, telemetry, or remote config added
- [ ] No master password or raw key is stored on disk
- [ ] No plaintext vault/export data is written
- [ ] No sensitive values are logged
- [ ] Wrong passwords still fail authentication
- [ ] Sensitive screens remain screenshot-protected
